Name: UMovieSceneCapture
Description: Class responsible for capturing scene data

Variables.Name: CaptureType
Variables.Description: The type of capture protocol to use

Variables.Name: ProtocolSettings
Variables.Description: Settings specific to the capture protocol

Variables.Name: Settings
Variables.Description: Settings that define how to capture

Variables.Name: bUseSeparateProcess
Variables.Description: Whether to capture the movie in a separate process or not

Variables.Name: bCloseEditorWhenCaptureStarts
Variables.Description: When enabled, the editor will shutdown when the capture starts

Variables.Name: AdditionalCommandLineArguments
Variables.Description: Additional command line arguments to pass to the external process when capturing

Variables.Name: InheritedCommandLineArguments
Variables.Description: Command line arguments inherited from this process
